strengths: Proven full-stack development experience across multiple technologies
Strong background in event-driven systems and microservices architecture
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and regulated environments
No clear evidence of experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
Limited visibility into high-level technical leadership and governance experience
response.justification: The candidate lacks critical experience in fintech infrastructure and scaling large engineering teams, while their technical leadership background is not clearly demonstrated at the required executive level.
